judgment.summary: Alphabet demonstrates robust growth, strong profitability, and a solid balance sheet, trading at a reasonable forward multiple given its expansion into AI.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimates by 91.6%; next earnings date is 2026-07-23.
positives: Revenue growth 21.8% YoY and earnings growth 82.0% YoY indicate strong top-line and bottom-line expansion.
Operating margin 36.1% and profit margin 37.9% reflect excellent operational efficiency and profitability.
Return on equity 38.9% and return on assets 14.6% show effective utilization of shareholder equity and assets.
Free cash flow $27.92B TTM provides ample resources for investment and shareholder returns.
Strong buy consensus from 53 analysts with a mean target price of $428.96 suggests significant upside potential.
negatives: PEG ratio 1.53 suggests the stock may be slightly overvalued relative to its expected earnings growth.
Debt/Equity ratio of 20.03% is relatively low, but could increase with further debt financing.
Dividend yield of 0.2% is minimal, indicating a focus on reinvestment rather than income distribution.

news.paragraph: Alphabet is actively expanding its AI capabilities beyond search, evidenced by its Gemini Enterprise Agent Marketplace and a new partnership with Amdocs. While headlines also touch on the broader AI market and the valuation of key players like Nvidia, the focus for GOOGL is on its strategic moves to diversify revenue streams. The company's ongoing investment in AI is a key theme to watch, especially with the next earnings report approaching.

headlines.title: Alphabet (GOOGL): Moving Beyond Search in the AI Revolution
Even at $5 Trillion, Nvidia Is Underappreciated
Alphabet Inc. (GOOGL) Expands Gemini Enterprise Agent Marketplace with Amdocs Partnership

examples.body: $MSFT am realizing this stock is going to $800-$1000 I suggest doing a little more scenario analysis, just so you don't kick yourself +100% later.. $GOOGL …
$MSFT $GOOGL and minutes later i see this: https://www.cnbc.com/2026/05/21/anthropic-microsoft-maia-200-ai-chip.html 📈
$GOOGL whenever this breaks $394 will go onto new ath. They own a % of spacex so maybe runs into June 12 event
